description_long: This is a medium-sized deciduous tree with a slender, upright trunk and a moderately dense canopy of broad, simple leaves. The trunk is light gray with subtle textural markings, branching out into several main limbs that divide further into thinner branches. The leaves are oval-shaped, slightly pointed, and arranged alternately along the branches, giving the tree a natural, airy appearance. The canopy is somewhat rounded, with visible gaps between clusters of foliage, allowing light to filter through. The tree's overall structure suggests it is well-suited for urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or residential streets. No roots are visible above the ground, and the tree appears healthy and well-maintained.
description: A medium-sized deciduous tree with a light gray trunk, moderately dense canopy, and broad, simple leaves arranged alternately on slender branches.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main trunk, several primary branches, and a rounded canopy with visible gaps between leaf clusters.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tree's symmetrical branching and the spread of the canopy, with more visible leaf density on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full extent of the canopy and the alternate arrangement of leaves, with the trunk partially obscured by foliage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the branching structure and the distribution of leaves, with some lower branches more exposed.
